tasks.title: Generate A Release Notes Digest
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited deployment notes from stdin in the format '<team>|<change type>|<summary>'. Produce exactly this markdown table format, with the columns 'team', 'feature changes', and 'fix changes', sorted alphabetically by team.

test_cases.input:
api|feature|Added audit logging
web|fix|Fixed checkout redirect
api|fix|Patched token refresh
test_cases.expected_output:
| team | feature changes | fix changes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| api | 1 | 1 |
| web | 0 | 1 |

test_cases.input:
search|feature|Added filters
api|fix|Patched token refresh
search|fix|Reduced latency
test_cases.expected_output:
| team | feature changes | fix changes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| api | 0 | 1 |
| search | 1 | 1 |

tasks.title: Summarize Checkout Errors From Logs
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited checkout error messages from stdin. Produce exactly this markdown table format with the columns 'message' and 'count', sorted by descending count and then alphabetically for ties.

test_cases.input:
Checkout failed
Network timeout
Checkout failed
test_cases.expected_output:
| message | count |
| --- | --- |
| Checkout failed | 2 |
| Network timeout | 1 |

test_cases.input:
Timeout
Timeout
Auth failed
Auth failed
Auth failed

tasks.title: Roll Up Monthly Revenue From CSV
tasks.description: Read CSV rows from stdin with header month,amount. Produce exactly this CSV report with the header 'month,total', one row per month, and totals in first-seen month order.

tasks.title: Roll Up Incident Ownership From Terminal Output
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited incident records from stdin in the format '<owner> <status>'. Produce exactly this markdown incident report format with the columns 'owner', 'open incidents', and 'closed incidents', sorted alphabetically by owner.

test_cases.input:
alex open
sam closed
alex open
mira open
test_cases.expected_output:
| owner | open incidents | closed incidents |
| --- | --- | --- |
| alex | 2 | 0 |
| mira | 1 | 0 |
| sam | 0 | 1 |

test_cases.input:
alex open
mira open
alex closed
zoe open
mira open
zoe closed
test_cases.expected_output:
| owner | open incidents | closed incidents |
| --- | --- | --- |
| alex | 1 | 1 |
| mira | 2 | 0 |
| zoe | 1 | 1 |

tasks.title: Summarize Support Escalations Into Markdown
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited support escalation records from stdin in the format '<priority>|<team>|<status>'. Produce exactly this markdown report format with the columns 'team', 'p1 open', 'p2 open', and 'p3 open', sorted alphabetically by team.

artifact_expectation.description: Markdown table with columns team, p1 open, p2 open, and p3 open escalations
artifact_expectation.expected_output:
| team | p1 open | p2 open | p3 open |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| billing | 1 | 0 | 0 |
| platform | 1 | 0 | 0 |
